input.prompt: A primitive red ochre fish and a stone spear painted directly onto a rough cracked cave wall
input.global_style: hand-drawn prehistoric illustration, aged parchment or cave-stone texture, rough charcoal outlines, muted ochre clay charcoal and moss pigments, flat colors, simple readable composition, no text
input.negative_prompt: modern objects, glossy 3D, vector art, neon colors, text, letters, watermark
